results.heading: Results
results.emptyBody: Fill in the form on the left to calculate your BOM instantly.
results.placeholder: Results will appear here once you enter sizing parameters.

placeholders.topologyBody: The Leaf-Spine topology diagram will be available after sizing parameters are entered.
placeholders.rackElevationBody: The rack elevation view will be available in a future phase.
placeholders.exportBody: Export to CSV and PDF will be available in a future phase.

validation.serverCountMin: Server count must be at least 1
validation.serversPerRackMax: Maximum 48 servers per rack for OOB port compatibility

topology.heading: Topology Diagram
topology.emptyBody: Enter sizing parameters in the Sizing tab to generate the topology diagram.

rack.heading: Rack Elevation
rack.emptyBody: Enter sizing parameters in the Sizing tab to generate the rack elevation view.

export.heading: Export
export.csvDescription: Download the Bill of Materials as a CSV file. Opens in Excel and Google Sheets.
export.pdfDescription: Generate a formatted report including BOM summary, sizing inputs, and topology diagram.
export.printDescription: Print the current view. Navigation controls are hidden automatically.
export.pdfErrorBody: Unable to generate the report. Check your sizing inputs and try again.

bom.heading: Bill of Materials
bom.emptyBody: Enter sizing parameters in the form to calculate your Bill of Materials.
bom.violationOobBody: {{required}} ports required but only {{available}} available on one S3248T-ON. Add a second OOB switch or reduce servers per rack.
bom.violationSpineBody: {{leafCount}} leaf switches exceed the {{maxLeafs}}-port capacity of the spine tier. Scale out spine switches or segment into multiple pods.
bom.violationDacBody: DAC cables are limited to 3m. With {{rackCount}} racks, verify all leaf-to-spine runs are within spec. Consider AOC or fiber for longer distances.
